creator: valenok@gmail.com
text:
Fix: PORTNAME=      shttpd
-PORTVERSION=   1.38
+PORTVERSION=   1.41
 CATEGORIES=    www
 MASTER_SITES=  ${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=    shttpd
@@ -17,6 +17,7 @@

 MAN1=          shttpd.1
 ALL_TARGET=    unix
+MAKE_ENV=      LIBS=-lpthread
 BUILD_WRKSRC=  ${WRKSRC}/src

 PLIST_FILES=   bin/shttpd
